payload.query: Identify the most notable works in partisan theories of legislative organization. How have they contributed to our understanding of Congressional politics? Where have they fallen short and what work should address such shortcomings?

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court’s Decision on Trump’s Sweeping Tariffs
articles.abstract: In a major setback for President Trump’s economic agenda, the court ruled that he could not invoke an emergency power to set tariffs on imports.
articles.snippet: In a major setback for President Trump’s economic agenda, the court ruled that he could not invoke an emergency power to set tariffs on imports.

articles.title: Read the Court Ruling on Trump’s Use of the Alien Enemies Act
articles.abstract: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.
articles.snippet: The ruling was a setback for the Trump administration on the mass deportation of immigrants, one of its domestic policy goals.

articles.title: This Senator Is a Relic of a Gentler G.O.P. How Long Can He Hold On?
articles.abstract: John Cornyn says his challenger doesn’t have the character to serve in the Senate. MAGA voters might not care.
articles.snippet: John Cornyn says his challenger doesn’t have the character to serve in the Senate. MAGA voters might not care.

articles.title: It’s a Miracle That Mexico Exists at All
articles.abstract: In a new book, Paul Gillingham tells the story of a nation that has thrived because of its diversity, not in spite of it.
